title: Name Lib
description: A simple library datapack for getting player usernames
body:
# Name Lib
### What is it?
Name Lib is a library that gets the username of any player for you to use.
### How to use it?
Simply run `function name_lib:get_name` as the player you want the name of, the datapack outputs this to the storage `name_lib:main name`
### Why use Name Lib?
In mineraft there is no single command to get a player name, so this small datapack adds one.
